mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate lowers the discount rate applied to future equity cash flows, directly increasing present valuations and generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns during rate cuts are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: When the unemployment rate exceeds 6.0 percent, labor market slack signals weakening consumer demand and corporate earnings growth, triggering negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20-day returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite the negative signal, or out-of-sample classification accuracy drops below 55%.

mechanism_narrative: Rising real stock prices combined with falling borrowing costs amplify household wealth effects and credit availability, jointly driving higher consumer spending and generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Interaction term coefficient becomes statistically insignificant (p > 0.10) in a multivariate regression, or joint signal fails to beat single-proxy baselines over 3-year rolling windows.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp month-over-month increase in the industrial production index reflects rapid capacity utilization and supply-side momentum, which translates into positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next week.
failure_condition: 5-day forward returns show no significant positive correlation with INDPRO momentum (Rank IC < 0.02) during recovery phases, or signal accuracy falls below 50%.

mechanism_narrative: When housing starts fall below 700 thousand units, the construction sector contraction signals a broader demand slowdown and reduced economic activity, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns remain positive in > 65% of triggered instances, or the threshold signal yields a negative Sharpe ratio in out-of-sample testing.

mechanism_narrative: Elevated consumer price index levels erode real corporate profit margins and prompt anticipatory monetary tightening, which compresses equity valuations and generates negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: 60-day forward returns exhibit a positive correlation with CPIAUCSL levels (Rank IC > 0.05), or inflation spikes fail to predict subsequent equity drawdowns.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous growth in total nonfarm payrolls and a declining unemployment rate indicate a tightening labor market that supports wage growth and consumer spending, jointly driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: The joint signal loses predictive power when either proxy moves independently, or interaction effect becomes insignificant (p > 0.10) in walk-forward regressions.

mechanism_narrative: Quarterly real GDP growth exceeding trend pace reflects robust aggregate demand and business investment, which sustains corporate earnings momentum and produces positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: 60-day forward returns show no significant positive association with above-trend GDP growth (Rank IC < 0.03), or signal accuracy drops below 52% in early-cycle samples.
